faqs.question: What types of spiders are most common in Bushwick apartments and lofts?
faqs.answer: Bushwick residents typically encounter common house spiders, cellar spiders, and occasionally wolf spiders. The neighborhood's older buildings and converted industrial spaces often have basements and storage areas where spiders thrive. We provide thorough inspections and customized treatments to address spider problems specific to your building type.
